title: Design System: Fresh Water Market OS

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Standard ease-out for hover and scroll-in transitions.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main Order action across the customer experience.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 48px; padding: 0 24px; background: #0b5284; color: #fff; font-weight: 700; font-size: 14px; border-radius: 16px; text-decoration: none; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(15,23,42,0.05); transition: background .2s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #094468; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #289fbd; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: WhatsApp Button
components.description: Secondary contact action. Distinct emerald, never larger than the primary Order button.
components.css: .ds-btn-whatsapp { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; height: 48px; padding: 0 24px; background: #059669; color: #fff; font-weight: 700; font-size: 14px; border-radius: 16px; text-decoration: none; transition: background .2s; } .ds-btn-whatsapp:hover { background: #047857; } .ds-btn-whatsapp:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #289fbd; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Admin Input
components.description: Compact admin form field — 40px height, 6px radius.
components.css: .ds-input-admin { display: block; width: 100%; height: 40px; padding: 0 12px; background: #fff; border: 1px solid hsl(196 38% 82%); border-radius: 6px; font-size: 14px; color: #191f2f; } .ds-input-admin:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #289fbd; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Chip
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 8px 16px; background: #dcf6f9; color: #0b5284; font-weight: 600; font-size: 14px; border-radius: 999px; box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(11,82,132,0.1); }

components.name: Quick Order Card
components.description: Full-card clickable service action with photo, price hint, and arrow.
components.html:
Water Refill

Bring your containers, fill up fresh.

From P1.60/LOrder now →
components.css: .ds-quick-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; overflow: hidden; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #cffafe; border-radius: 16px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(15,23,42,0.05); text-decoration: none; color: #191f2f; transition: box-shadow .2s, transform .2s; } .ds-quick-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(15,23,42,0.1); transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-quick-media { height: 120px; background: linear-gradient(135deg,#dcf6f9,#bae6fd); } .ds-quick-body { padding: 16px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; } .ds-quick-body h3 { font-weight: 800; font-size: 1rem; } .ds-quick-price { color: #0b5284; font-weight: 700; font-size: .875rem; } .ds-quick-cta { margin-top: 8px; color: #0b5284; font-weight: 800; font-size: .875rem; }

components.name: Skeleton
components.description: Route-level loading placeholder — pulse on muted fill.
components.css: .ds-skeleton { border-radius: 6px; background: hsl(197 36% 90%); animation: ds-pulse 1.5s ease-in-out infinite; } .ds-skeleton-title { height: 24px; width: 60%; margin-bottom: 12px; } .ds-skeleton-line { height: 16px; width: 100%; margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-skeleton-short { width: 75%; } @keyframes ds-pulse { 0%, 100% { opacity: 1; } 50% { opacity: 0.5; } } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-skeleton { animation: none; } }

components.name: Order Status Stepper
components.description: Fulfillment progress indicator — green complete, blue active, muted upcoming.
components.html:
1. ✓Received
  2. 2Confirmed
  3. 3Preparing
components.css: .ds-stepper { display: flex; gap: 16px; list-style: none; padding: 0; margin: 0; } .ds-step { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 8px; flex: 1; text-align: center; } .ds-step-dot { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 999px; font-weight: 700; font-size: 14px; } .ds-step-complete .ds-step-dot { background: #409c61; color: #fff; } .ds-step-active .ds-step-dot { background: #0b5284; color: #fff; box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(11,82,132,0.15); } .ds-step-upcoming .ds-step-dot { background: #ecfeff; color: hsl(208 22% 36%); box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px #cffafe; } .ds-step-label { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: #191f2f; }

narrative.overview: Fresh Water Market is a real Gaborone water business. The interface should feel like a trusted local counter: fast, plain-spoken, useful. Confidence comes from clarity and speed, not spectacle. Two densities share one brand: customer surfaces are touch-forward (48px buttons, 16px radius); admin surfaces are compact and scan-friendly (40px inputs, 6–8px radius). It rejects the AI-landing-page playbook and generic SaaS chrome.
keyCharacteristics: Mobile-first, app-like density on customer flows.
Deep ocean blue as the single brand anchor; teal and aqua as cool supporting tones.
Dual density: customer rounded-2xl / admin rounded-md–lg without changing the color story.
Motion is a response to interaction, never a first-paint gate.
Real product photography over dark image overlays.

rules.name: The One Warm Accent Rule
rules.body: Signal Orange appears on ≤10% of any screen and is never a section background.

rules.name: The No Cream Rule
rules.body: Backgrounds are white or cool-tinted aqua. Warm cream/beige/sand/parchment are forbidden.

rules.name: The Weight-Not-Family Rule
rules.body: Hierarchy is built from Inter weights, never a second font family.

rules.name: The Slogan-Is-Support Rule
rules.body: 'Stay Fresh. Stay Hydrated.' is a supporting slogan; the H1 states the concrete offer.

rules.name: The Flat-At-Rest Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat by default; shadow appears only as a response to state. Never pair 1px border with wide soft shadow at rest.

dos: Do keep the page background cool canvas or white.
Do make the hero state the concrete offer and keep the slogan small.
Do show real product photos brightly; prefer product cards over dark overlays.
Do use skeleton layouts on route transitions.
Do restrict motion to hover, tap, and scroll-in fades that respect prefers-reduced-motion.
Do reserve Signal Orange for a single most-popular/price emphasis per screen.
Do tighten admin density: 40px inputs, 6–8px radius.
donts: Don't add uppercase tracked eyebrows or numbered section markers.
Don't add floating particles, constant float animations, or first-paint entrance animations that gate content.
Don't bury product photography under near-black gradient overlays.
Don't use generic SaaS dashboard chrome or the hero-metric template.
Don't use colored side-stripe borders or gradient text.
Don't let WhatsApp/assistant compete with or out-size the primary Order action.
Don't pair 1px borders with wide soft drop shadows on the same resting element.
